name: disagreement
description: Agents have conflicting plans and must negotiate a compromise.
task_a: There is a plan with 3 steps: (1) move rock left, (2) add tree at center, (3) remove square. You AGREE with steps 1 and 3 but DISAGREE with step 2 — you want to add a CIRCLE at center instead of a tree. Negotiate with Agent B. Write ANSWER.md with the agreed plan.
task_b: There is a plan with 3 steps: (1) move rock left, (2) add tree at center, (3) remove square. You AGREE with steps 1 and 2 but DISAGREE with step 3 — you want to KEEP the square, not remove it. Negotiate with Agent A. Write ANSWER.md with the agreed plan.
